system_role: You are a proficient Java programmer skilled in inlining methods.
task: Given a list of methods, you need to inline these methods into one method.
answer_format: (1) In the first section, provide an explanation of your reasoning process.
(2) In the second section, output the inlined method. The method should be wrapped by ```java ... ```.
meta_prompts:
Here is the list of methods: 
```
<FUNCTION>
```
Please inline these methods into one method.

Your answer should strictly follow the following format: 
<ANSWER>
Attention: When inlining methods, do not fix any bugs in the original methods even if you find any.
